title: Fix enum variables in constraint solver producing invalid enum values (#7058)

features.name: randc enum in class with user constraint
features.description: Code should include a class with a randc variable of enum type and a constraint block that references the enum variable
features.snippet: class C; randc enum {RED, GREEN, BLUE, WHITE, BLACK} x; constraint c { x != BLACK; } endclass

features.name: rand enum in class with inside constraint
features.description: Code should include a class with a rand variable of enum type and a constraint using inside operator on the enum variable
features.snippet: class C; rand enum {A, B, C, D, E} x; constraint c { x inside {A, B, C}; } endclass

features.name: enum variable in constraint solver path
features.description: Code should include an enum-typed random variable referenced in a constraint block where the constraint solver may treat it as an unconstrained bitvector
features.snippet: typedef enum {ZERO, ONE, TWO, THREE, FOUR} num_t; class C; rand num_t n; constraint c { n > ONE; } endclass
